title: Stochastic Processes & Path Integrals: EML Depth of Randomness

holder_exponent.note: BM distribution = EML-2; individual BM path = EML-∞

brownian_motion.key_insight: BM distribution = EML-2; individual sample path = EML-∞ (non-differentiable)

wick_rotation.note: Wick rotation is an EML 3→1 depth reduction (oscillatory → equilibrium)
wick_rotation.saddle_point: Classical path = saddle of S_E: EML-1 minimum

path_integrals.key_insight: Feynman paths = EML-3 (oscillatory); Wick rotation = 3→1; path measure = EML-∞

large_deviations.key_insight: Rate functions = EML-2; rare event probability = EML-1; entropy production = EML-2

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Quadratic variation [X,X]_T = σ²T (linear), Itô correction for x²
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: BCS/Kondo-like: FW exit probability exp(-I/ε), Euclidean propagator
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: BM transition density, Cramér rate function, entropy production, stochastic action
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Feynman path integral (oscillatory, Minkowski), BM density at small t
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Individual Brownian sample path (Hölder-1/2, non-differentiable), path measure

key_theorem: The EML Stochastic Depth Theorem: The distribution of a stochastic process is EML-2 (entropy, rate functions). Feynman path integrals in Minkowski space are EML-3 (oscillatory). Wick rotation achieves an EML 3→1 depth reduction (oscillatory → damped). But any individual sample path of Brownian motion is EML-∞: Hölder-1/2 but not Hölder-1/2+ε — the path is a non-EML-finite object. Randomness stratifies: mean = EML-2, fluctuation = EML-1, sample path = EML-∞.
rabbit_hole_log: BM transition density = EML-2: Gaussian (exp of -x²/t) = quadratic EML
Sample BM path = EML-∞: Hölder-½ but non-differentiable — fractal trajectory
Feynman exp(iS/ℏ) = EML-3: oscillatory phase (same as Fourier basis)
Wick rotation 3→1: same class of reduction as period-doubling approximation
Cramér rate I(x) = (x-μ)²/2σ² = EML-2: same as quadratic Lyapunov function!

connections.S57_stat_mech: Boltzmann partition = EML-1; path integral (Euclidean) = EML-1; same!
connections.S155_qft_nonpert: Instanton = EML-1 (Euclidean); Wick rotation confirms EML-3→1
connections.S152_chaos_control: Lyapunov V = EML-2 (quadratic); Cramér rate = EML-2 (same structure)
